articles.title: AMD Announces Socket AM5 Longevity till 2029 - TechPowerUp

articles.author: Chris Welch
articles.title: Dell Rivals Apple’s MacBook Neo With $699 Touch-Screen XPS 13 Laptop - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Dell Technologies Inc. introduced a redesigned XPS 13 laptop, positioning the device as a direct answer to Apple Inc.’s popular MacBook Neo, which stunned the budget PC market upon its debut in March with its features and price.
